texto: My sister is my little star, and I'm excited for her and proud of her. texto: My mom always taught me to put toothpaste on pimples to dry them out at night. I do that all the time. I don't use anything fancy when I get a pimple. And I never use the same toothpaste for long because I get bored. So I'll do peppermint and then one month I'll do cinnamon. I'm creative.

texto: Everyone has a different body shape, so you kind of have to figure out not only what works best for your body type, but what also makes you feel confident.
